data.name: Choice_Description
data.value: Pick how you want to use CloudRedirect. You can always upgrade from STFixer to Cloud Redirect later.

data.name: Choice_STFixer_Description
data.value: Core fixes. Makes Capcom games save, enables SteamTools activation when some SteamTools servers are down, enables manifest pinning. Does not enable Cloud Saves.

data.name: Choice_STFixer_Features
data.value: Includes: Capcom save fix, SteamTools offline patch, DLL deploy, manifest version pinning

data.name: Choice_CloudRedirect_Description
data.value: Everything in ST Fixer, plus Cloud Save redirection. Redirects Steam Cloud for lua games to Google Drive/OneDrive/a local folder.

data.name: Choice_CloudRedirect_Features
data.value: Includes: All STFixer features + cloud save redirect, cloud provider sync, app management, contamination cleanup

data.name: Choice_CurrentMode_STFixer_Desc
data.value: You can upgrade to Cloud Redirect mode by selecting the option below. This is one-way -- Cloud Redirect includes everything in STFixer plus cloud features.

data.name: Choice_CurrentMode_CloudRedirect_Desc
data.value: All features are enabled. Cloud save interception is active.

data.name: Setup_Description
data.value: Apply patches and deploy CloudRedirect to your Steam installation.

data.name: Setup_Description_STFixer
data.value: Apply patches for the Capcom save fix and manifest pinning.

data.name: Setup_ShowDiagnosticsHint
data.value: Steam version, path, and individual patch controls

data.name: Setup_OfflineSetupDescription
data.value: Patches SteamTools so it works even when their activation servers are down. Required for first-time installations.

data.name: Setup_StExeDescription
data.value: Disables the SteamTools Desktop App from overwriting patched DLLs on every startup. Without this, SteamTools will undo core patches.

data.name: Setup_CloudRedirectPatchHeader_STFixer
data.value: Save Fix and Manifest Pinning Patch

data.name: Setup_CloudRedirectPatchDescription
data.value: Patches SteamTools payload so lua app cloud saves are routed through the CloudRedirect system.

data.name: Setup_CloudRedirectPatchDescription_STFixer
data.value: Patches SteamTools payload to fix Capcom save routing and enable manifest pinning for lua apps.

data.name: Setup_DeployDescription
data.value: Copies core DLL to your Steam folder.

data.name: Setup_SteamNotFoundManual
data.value: Not found -- click Change to set manually

data.name: Setup_DllNotInstalledNoEmbed
data.value: Not installed -- DLL not embedded in this build

data.name: Setup_InvalidSteamFolderMessage
data.value:
The selected folder doesn't contain steam.exe.
Please select the folder where Steam is installed.

data.name: Setup_DllNotEmbeddedMessage
data.value:
cloud_redirect.dll is not embedded in this build.
Rebuild the UI after building the C++ DLL.

data.name: Setup_ConfirmRunAll
data.value:
This will apply all patches and deploy the DLL:
1. SteamTools Offline Setup 2. Patch SteamTools.exe 3. Cloud Redirect Patch 4. Deploy cloud_redirect.dll
If Steam is running, it will be closed automatically. Backups will be created.
Continue?

data.name: Setup_ConfirmOfflineSetup
data.value:
This patches SteamTools so it works even when their activation servers are down.
If Steam is running, it will be closed automatically. A backup will be created.
Continue?

data.name: Setup_ConfirmRevertOffline
data.value:
This will revert the offline setup patch, restoring original SteamTools activation behavior.
If Steam is running, it will be closed automatically.
Continue?

data.name: Setup_ConfirmPatchStExe
data.value:
This patches SteamTools.exe to stop it from overwriting patched DLLs on every startup.
If Steam is running, it will be closed automatically. A backup will be created.
Continue?

data.name: Setup_ConfirmRevertStExe
data.value:
This will restore SteamTools.exe to its original state, allowing it to overwrite DLLs on startup again.
If Steam is running, it will be closed automatically.
Continue?

data.name: Setup_ConfirmApplyPatch
data.value:
This will patch steamclient64.dll to redirect cloud RPCs.
If Steam is running, it will be closed automatically. A backup will be created.
Continue?

data.name: Setup_ConfirmRevertPatch
data.value:
This will revert the cloud redirect patch on steamclient64.dll, restoring original behavior.
If Steam is running, it will be closed automatically.
Continue?

data.name: Setup_ConfirmDeploy
data.value:
This will deploy cloud_redirect.dll to your Steam folder.
If Steam is running, it will be closed automatically.
Continue?

data.name: Setup_ConfirmUninstall
data.value:
This will delete cloud_redirect.dll from your Steam folder.
If Steam is running, it will be closed automatically.
Continue?

data.name: Setup_ConfigureProviderExisting
Setup_ConfigureProviderNew
Setup_PatchingFinishedWithErrors
data.value: Patching finished (some steps failed -- see log).

data.name: Dashboard_UpdateAvailableDescription
data.value: A newer version of the CloudRedirect DLL is available. Please update.

data.name: Dashboard_LogNotFound
data.value: Log file not found. Start Steam with CloudRedirect installed first.

data.name: Dashboard_DllUpdatedRestartPrompt
data.value:
cloud_redirect.dll has been updated.
Restart Steam now?

data.name: Dashboard_RestartSteamPrompt
data.value: This will shut down Steam and restart it. Continue?

data.name: Dashboard_SteamStillRunningPrompt
data.value: Steam did not shut down within 15 seconds. Force-kill it?

data.name: CloudProvider_Description
data.value: Configure your Steam Cloud provider. Google Drive/OneDrive/Local Folder only for now.

data.name: CloudProvider_SyncFolderHint
data.value: Choose any folder -- including a mapped network drive, USB drive, or NAS share.

data.name: CloudProvider_LocalStorageHint
data.value: Saves are stored locally in your Steam folder. No cloud sync.

data.name: CloudProvider_MissingPathMessage
data.value: Please set a token file path first.

data.name: Apps_Description
data.value: Cloud save data for your injected apps.

data.name: Apps_DeleteTooltip
data.value: Delete all saves for this app

data.name: Apps_RestoreDescription
data.value: Restore files from a previous delete backup. Each delete creates an immutable, timestamped backup. Restoring copies files back without modifying the backup.

data.name: Apps_DeletePromptSkipped
data.value: (Skipped {0} path(s) that could not be resolved: {1})

data.name: Apps_DeletePromptExplanation
data.value: Local saves will be backed up, but restoring them is complex. You would have to disable cloud storage for the game in Steam, restore the backup, and then launch the game. If you continue, your cloud saves will be lost. Those are not backed up.

data.name: Apps_DeletePromptConsequence
data.value: If you continue, the game will behave as if you never played it. You will start the game from the beginning on next launch.

data.name: Apps_FinalConfirmMessage
data.value:
This will delete all save data for {0} ({1}).
Local saves will be backed up, but cloud copies will be permanently lost. Restoring saves is tricky.
Are you sure?

data.name: Apps_PartialDeleteMessage
Apps_DeletedMessage
Apps_PruneTooltip
data.value: Delete orphan cloud blobs no longer referenced by this app

data.name: Apps_ScanOrphansExplainMessage
data.value:
An "orphan" is a save file in your cloud storage that no app on this PC still references -- left behind when a save was renamed, an app was uninstalled, or a sync was interrupted. They take up space and can shadow newer saves on conflict.
This scan only reads your cloud listings; nothing is deleted. After the scan, each affected app gets a "Review Orphans" button so you can inspect the files and decide whether to prune them.
Steam must be closed during the scan so an in-flight upload can't be misread as an orphan. Continue?

data.name: Apps_ScanLocalOnlyMessage
data.value: CloudRedirect is configured for local-only storage. There is no cloud to scan for orphan blobs.

data.name: Apps_ScanCompleteCleanFormat
data.value: Scanned {0} app(s) -- no orphan cloud blobs found.

data.name: Apps_ScanCompleteFoundFormat
data.value: Found {0} orphan cloud blob(s) across {1} app(s).

data.name: Apps_ScanCompletePartialFormat
data.value: {0} app(s) could not be verified (listing incomplete).

data.name: Apps_PruneLocalOnlyMessage
data.value: CloudRedirect is configured for local-only storage. There is no cloud provider to prune orphan blobs from.

data.name: Apps_PruneNoOrphansMessageFormat
data.value: All {0} cloud blob(s) for {1} are referenced by the local save index. Nothing to prune.

data.name: Apps_PruneListingIncompleteMessage
data.value:
Could not retrieve a complete list of cloud blobs. Pruning on partial data would risk deleting legitimate saves, so the operation has been aborted. Try again when your connection to the cloud provider is stable.
Details: {0}

data.name: Apps_PruneConfirmExplanation
data.value: These blobs exist in your cloud provider ({0}) but are NOT referenced by the local save index (file_tokens.dat). They were left behind by a prior session, a failed delete, or a manual override, and will never be downloaded or cleaned up by the normal sync path.

data.name: Apps_PruneConfirmWarning
data.value: This operation cannot be undone. Local saves will NOT be affected.

data.name: Apps_PruneFinalConfirmMessageFormat
data.value: Permanently delete {0} orphan cloud blob(s) for {1}? This cannot be undone.

data.name: Apps_PrunePartialMessageFormat
Apps_PruneFailedMessageFormat
data.value:
Could not delete any of the {0} orphan blob(s) for {1}.
Details: {2}

data.name: Apps_RestoreConfirmMessage
data.value:
Restore save data from backup at {0}?
Backup contains: {1} file(s) ({2}) Apps: {3}
IMPORTANT: Before restoring, you must disable Steam Cloud for this game: Steam > right-click the game > Properties > General > uncheck "Keep game saves in the Steam Cloud"
If Steam Cloud is enabled, Steam may overwrite the restored files.
This feature is experimental. Existing files at original locations will be skipped. The backup itself is never modified or deleted.

data.name: Apps_SkippedFormat
data.value: Skipped {0} file(s) (already exist at original location).

data.name: Cleanup_Description
data.value: SteamTools redirected all lua apps' cloud saves through app 760, polluting every game's remote/ folder with every other game's files. Scan to see which apps are affected, then select files to remove.

data.name: Cleanup_UndoBannerDescription
data.value: The backup is safe -- click Undo to restore all files to their original locations.

data.name: Cleanup_RestoreDescription
data.value: Restore files from a previous cleanup backup. Each cleanup run creates an immutable, timestamped backup. Restoring copies files back without modifying the backup.

data.name: Cleanup_NoNamespaceApps
data.value: No namespace apps with files found.

data.name: Cleanup_ScanStatusFormat
data.value: {0} apps scanned, {1} suspect files across {2} apps

data.name: Cleanup_NukeDescriptionFormat
data.value: Remove all {0} suspect files ({1}) across {2} app(s) in one shot. Everything is backed up and can be restored from the Restore tab.

data.name: Cleanup_ConfirmCleanAllMessage
data.value:
This will move {0} suspect file(s) ({1}) across {2} app(s) to the backup folder.
Backup location: cloud_redirect/cleanup_tab_backup/
Everything can be restored from the Restore tab.
Are you sure?

data.name: Cleanup_CleanupCompleteMessage
data.value: Moved {0} file(s) to backup. You can restore them from the Restore tab if needed.

data.name: Cleanup_RestoreConfirmMessage
Cleanup_SkippedFormat
data.value: Skipped {0} file(s) (already exist at original location).

data.name: Cleanup_UndoNoBackupFound
data.value: Could not find the backup from the last cleanup. Use Restore from Backup to find it manually.

data.name: Cleanup_NothingSelectedMessage
data.value: Select files to remove by checking the boxes.

data.name: Cleanup_ConfirmCleanupMessage
data.value:
This will move {0} file(s) ({1}) to the backup folder.
Backup location: cloud_redirect/cleanup_tab_backup/{2}/
Files can be restored from the Restore tab. Continue?

data.name: Settings_CheckForUpdatesHint
data.value: Click to check for a newer version.

data.name: Settings_ResetCacheDescription
data.value: Deletes CloudRedirect local cache. This only removes the cache and forces the cloud provider to resync. This can cause data loss in some edge cases!

data.name: Settings_AboutDescription
data.value: Cloud saves for non-owned Steam games

data.name: Settings_NewerVersionAvailable
data.value: A newer version is available. You are running v{0}.

data.name: Settings_LatestVersionFormat
data.value: You are running the latest version (v{0}).

data.name: Settings_ConfirmResetMessage
data.value:
This will delete the CloudRedirect local cache and force the cloud provider to resync.
This can cause data loss in some edge cases.
Are you sure?

data.name: Settings_ResetDoneMessage
data.value: Local cache has been reset. The cloud provider will resync on next launch.

data.name: Disclaimer_WarningBold
data.value: Cloud Save Redirection is EXPERIMENTAL and under active development.

data.name: Disclaimer_BackUpBold
data.value: BACK UP YOUR SAVES before using this.

data.name: Disclaimer_ExplanationText
data.value: If something goes wrong, your LOCAL SAVES could be corrupted or lost. Make sure you have backups of any saves you care about before proceeding.

data.name: Steam_IsRunningMessage
data.value: Steam must be closed before continuing. Please close Steam and try again.

data.name: Backup_NoFilesOnDisk
data.value: No backup files found on disk

data.name: Preview_SummaryFormat
data.value: Preview: {0} file(s) would be restored, {1} skipped (already exist), {2} remotecache(s)

data.name: EmbeddedDll_NotEmbedded
data.value: cloud_redirect.dll is not embedded in this build

data.name: EmbeddedDll_InUse
data.value: cloud_redirect.dll is in use (close Steam first)

data.name: OAuth_AuthSuccessBody
data.value: You can close this tab and return to CloudRedirect.

data.name: OAuth_AuthFailedBody
data.value: Please close this tab and try again.

data.name: Settings_LanguageHint
data.value: Select your preferred language. Changes take effect after restart.

data.name: Settings_SyncHint
data.value: These settings control what data is synced between your PCs via the cloud provider. Changes take effect after restarting Steam.

data.name: Settings_SyncAchievementsHint
data.value: Upload and merge achievement progress for lua apps across PCs.

data.name: Settings_SyncPlaytimeHint
data.value: Upload and merge playtime data for lua apps across PCs.

data.name: Settings_SyncLuasHint
data.value: Sync lua files themselves between PCs so you don't have to install them again.

data.name: Settings_CloudRedirectEnabledHint
data.value: When enabled, cloud saves for lua apps are intercepted and stored locally (and optionally synced to your cloud provider). When disabled, only manifest pinning and patches are active. Changes take effect after restarting Steam.

data.name: Settings_ManifestPinningHint
data.value: Control whether lua apps can be pinned to specific versions. Per-app pins can be configured in the config file at the Steam folder. Changes take effect after restarting Steam.

data.name: Settings_ManifestPinningEnabledHint
data.value: When enabled, lua apps can be locked to specific versions.

data.name: Settings_AutoCommentHint
data.value: When enabled, the SetManifestID specified in the lua will be treated as if it were commented out. If disabled, the SetManifestID will be respected, meaning your game will be locked to the version specified in the lua. This setting never modifies lua files on disk.

data.name: Pin_PerAppHint
data.value: These are your lua games/apps. Enable the app below to pin it to the version specified in the lua. When auto comment is on, only apps enabled here will be pinned. Changes take effect after restarting Steam.

data.name: Pin_NoEntries
data.value: No lua files with setManifestid found.

data.name: Search_Placeholder
data.value: Search by name or app ID...
